o=i.settings.size.width[i.LEV]||i.settings.size.width[i.LEV++]||i.settings.size.width[i.LEV--]||n,l=i.settings.size.height[i.LEV]||i.settings.size.height[i.LEV++]||i.settings.size.height[i.LEV--]||0,r=i.settings.size.minHeight[i.LEV]||i.settings.size.minHeight[i.LEV++]||i.settings.size.minHeight[i.LEV--]||0;if(l="auto"==l?0:l,l=parseInt(l),"carousel"!==e.type&&(n-=parseInt(e.onw??0)||0),i.MP=!i.settings.size.fullWidth&&n<o||_tpt.winW<o?Math.min(1,n/o):1,e.size.fullScreen||e.size.fullHeight){let t=parseInt(e.fho)||0,s=(""+e.fho).indexOf("%")>-1;e.newh=_tpt.winH-(s?_tpt.winH*t/100:t)}else e.newh=i.MP*Math.max(l,r);if(e.newh+=(parseInt(e.onh??0)||0)+(parseInt(e.carousel?.pt)||0)+(parseInt(e.carousel?.pb)||0),void 0!==e.slideduration&&(e.newh=Math.max(e.newh,parseInt(e.slideduration)/3)),e.shdw&&_tpt.buildShadow(e.id,e),i.c.adjuster.style.height=e.newh+"px",i.c.module.style.height=e.newh+"px",i.c.content.style.height=e.newh+"px",i.states.heightPrepared=!0,i.dims??={},i.dims.moduleRect=i.c.module.getBoundingClientRect(),i.c.content.style.left="-"+i.dims.moduleRect.left+"px",!i.settings.size.fullWidth)return s&&requestAnimationFrame(()=>{n!==i.c.module.parentNode.offsetWidth&&_tpt.updatePMHeight(e.id,e)}),void _tpt.bgStyle(e.id,e,window.innerWidth==_tpt.winW,!0);_tpt.bgStyle(e.id,e,window.innerWidth==_tpt.winW,!0),requestAnimationFrame(function(){s&&requestAnimationFrame(()=>{n!==i.c.module.parentNode.offsetWidth&&_tpt.updatePMHeight(e.id,e)})}),i.earlyResizerFunction||(i.earlyResizerFunction=function(){requestAnimationFrame(function(){_tpt.getWinDim(),_tpt.moduleDefaults(e.id,e),_tpt.updateSlideBg(t,!0)})},window.addEventListener("resize",i.earlyResizerFunction))},_tpt.buildShadow=function(t,e){let s=SR7.M[t];null==s.c.shadow&&(s.c.shadow=document.createElement("sr7-module-shadow"),s.c.shadow.classList.add("sr7-shdw-"+e.shdw),s.c.content.appendChild(s.c.shadow))},_tpt.bgStyle=async(t,e,s,i,n)=>{const o=SR7.M[t];if((e=e??o.settings).fixed&&!o.c.module.classList.contains("sr7-top-fixed")&&(o.c.module.classList.add("sr7-top-fixed"),o.c.module.style.position="fixed",o.c.module.style.width="100%",o.c.module.style.top="0px",o.c.module.style.left="0px",o.c.module.style.pointerEvents="none",o.c.module.style.zIndex=5e3,o.c.content.style.pointerEvents="none"),null==o.c.bgcanvas){let t=document.createElement("sr7-module-bg"),l=!1;if("string"==typeof e?.bg?.color&&e?.bg?.color.includes("{"))if(_tpt.gradient&&_tpt.gsap)e.bg.color=_tpt.gradient.convert(e.bg.color);else try{let t=JSON.parse(e.bg.color);(t?.orig||t?.string)&&(e.bg.color=JSON.parse(e.bg.color))}catch(t){return}let r="string"==typeof e?.bg?.color?e?.bg?.color||"transparent":e?.bg?.color?.string??e?.bg?.color?.orig??e?.bg?.color?.color??"transparent";if(t.style["background"+(String(r).includes("grad")?"":"Color")]=r,("transparent"!==r||n)&&(l=!0),o.offsetPrepared&&(t.style.visibility="hidden"),e?.bg?.image?.src&&(t.style.backgroundImage=`url(${e?.bg?.image.src})`,t.style.backgroundSize=""==(e.bg.image?.size??"")?"cover":e.bg.image.size,t.style.backgroundPosition=e.bg.image.position,t.style.backgroundRepeat=""==e.bg.image.repeat||null==e.bg.image.repeat?"no-repeat":e.bg.image.repeat,l=!0),!l)return;o.c.bgcanvas=t,e.size.fullWidth?t.style.width=_tpt.winW-(s&&_tpt.winH<document.body.offsetHeight?_tpt.scrollBarW:0)+"px":i&&(t.style.width=o.c.module.offsetWidth+"px"),e.sbt?.use?o.c.content.appendChild(o.c.bgcanvas):o.c.module.appendChild(o.c.bgcanvas)}o.c.bgcanvas.style.height=void 0!==e.newh?e.newh+"px":("carousel"==e.type?o.dims.module.h:o.dims.content.h)+"px",o.c.bgcanvas.style.left=!s&&e.sbt?.use||o.c.bgcanvas.closest("SR7-CONTENT")?"0px":"-"+(o?.dims?.moduleRect?.left??0)+"px"},_tpt.updateSlideBg=function(t,e){const s=SR7.M[t];let i=s.settings;s?.c?.bgcanvas&&(i.size.fullWidth?s.c.bgcanvas.style.width=_tpt.winW-(e&&_tpt.winH<document.body.offsetHeight?_tpt.scrollBarW:0)+"px":preparing&&(s.c.bgcanvas.style.width=s.c.module.offsetWidth+"px"))},_tpt.moduleDefaults=(t,e)=>{let s=SR7.M[t];null!=s&&null!=s.c&&null!=s.c.module&&(s.dims??={},s.dims.moduleRect=s.c.module.getBoundingClientRect(),s.c.content.style.left="-"+s.dims.moduleRect.left+"px",s.c.content.style.width=_tpt.winW-_tpt.scrollBarW+"px","carousel"==e.type&&(s.c.module.style.overflow="visible"),_tpt.bgStyle(t,e,window.innerWidth==_tpt.winW))},_tpt.getOffset=t=>{var e=t.getBoundingClientRect(),s=window.pageXOffset||document.documentElement.scrollLeft,i=window.pageYOffset||document.documentElement.scrollTop;return{top:e.top+i,left:e.left+s}},_tpt.fillArray=function(t,e){let s,i;t=Array.isArray(t)?t:[t];let n=Array(e),o=t.length;for(i=0;i<t.length;i++)n[i+(e-o)]=t[i],null==s&&"#"!==t[i]&&(s=t[i]);for(let t=0;t<e;t++)void 0!==n[t]&&"#"!=n[t]||(n[t]=s),s=n[t];return n},_tpt.closestGE=function(t,e){let s=Number.MAX_VALUE,i=-1;for(let n=0;n<t.length;n++)t[n]-1>=e&&t[n]-1-e<s&&(s=t[n]-1-e,i=n);return++i}}();</script>
		<style id="wp-custom-css">
			[data-behaviour*='side'] .ct-panel-inner {
	backdrop-filter: blur(7px);
}

<section class="manifesto-container gsbp-03e134f">
<div class="line">
<span class="word">IN</span>



<span class="word">A</span>



<span class="image-wrapper image-editor">
<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" class="gsbp-3d12bed" src="https://ottmann-polignac.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/blog3-featured.jpg" alt="" width="1200" height="800"/>
</span>



<span class="word">WORLD</span>
</div>



<div class="line">
<span class="word">FULL</span>



<span class="word">OF</span>



<span class="word">NOISE,</span>



<span class="word">WE</span>
</div>



<div class="line">
<span class="word">HELP</span>



<span class="word">BRANDS</span>



<span class="image-wrapper image-editor">
<img decoding="async" src="https://ottmann-polignac.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/167-graphic-design.webp" alt="Hands sketching product concepts and geometric designs on paper alongside laptop." width="1920" height="1200" loading="lazy"/>
</span>



<span class="word">STAND</span>
</div>



<div class="line">
<span class="word">OUT</span>



<span class="word">WITH</span>



<span class="word">CLEAR</span>



<span class="word">IDEAS</span>
</div>



<div class="line">
<span class="word">AND</span>



<span class="image-wrapper image-editor">

</span>



<span class="word">GOOD</span>



<span class="word">DESIGN</span>
</div>



<div class="line">
<span class="word">THAT</span>



<span class="word">MAKES</span>



<span class="word">AN</span>

</span>
</div>

<div class="wp-block-greenshift-blocks-row-column gspb_row__col--6 gspb_row__col--md-12 gspb_row__col--xs-12 gspb_col-id-gsbp-94a173e" id="gspb_col-id-gsbp-94a173e">
<h2 id="gspb_heading-id-gsbp-c9e6f72" class="gspb_heading gspb_heading-id-gsbp-c9e6f72 ">Ready To Collaborate? Let’s Team Up And Shape The Future</h2>



<div id="gspb_text-id-gsbp-8ebd7a6" class="gspb_text gspb_text-id-gsbp-8ebd7a6 ">We’re always here to help and would love to connect with you. Feel free to reach out anytime, and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.</div>
</div>

												<svg class="joinchat__open__icon" width="60" height="60" viewbox="0 0 400 400">
							<path class="joinchat__pa" d="M168.83 200.504H79.218L33.04 44.284a1 1 0 0 1 1.386-1.188L365.083 199.04a1 1 0 0 1 .003 1.808L34.432 357.903a1 1 0 0 1-1.388-1.187l29.42-99.427"/>
							<path class="joinchat__pb" d="M318.087 318.087c-52.982 52.982-132.708 62.922-195.725 29.82l-80.449 10.18 10.358-80.112C18.956 214.905 28.836 134.99 81.913 81.913c65.218-65.217 170.956-65.217 236.174 0 42.661 42.661 57.416 102.661 44.265 157.316"/>

<style type="text/css" media="all">
.content-wrapper.alignwide{margin-bottom:0 !important;padding-bottom:0 !important}.manifesto-container{margin-bottom:0 !important;padding-bottom:3 !important}.manifesto-container <script src="https://ottmann-polignac.com/wp-content/plugins/google-site-kit/dist/assets/js/googlesitekit-events-provider-wpforms-08f4a4ca33532233b542.js" id="googlesitekit-events-provider-wpforms-js" defer></script>
<script id="gspb-js-blocks-js-after">
(function () {

    const gsManifestoRevealContainers = document.querySelectorAll('.manifesto-container');

    let gsManifestoRevealTicking = false;
    const gsManifestoRevealInstances = [];

    function gsManifestoRevealInit() {
        gsManifestoRevealContainers.forEach(container => {

            const gsManifestoRevealNodes = container.querySelectorAll('.word, .image-wrapper');

            const gsManifestoRevealItems = Array.from(gsManifestoRevealNodes).map(node => ({
                node: node,
                type: node.classList.contains('image-wrapper') ? 'image' : 'text'
            }));

            const gsManifestoRevealInstance = {
                container,
                items: gsManifestoRevealItems,
                nodes: gsManifestoRevealNodes
            };

            gsManifestoRevealInstances.push(gsManifestoRevealInstance);

            gsManifestoRevealMeasureImages(gsManifestoRevealInstance);
            gsManifestoRevealSetupStagger(gsManifestoRevealInstance);
        });

        gsManifestoRevealUpdate();
    }

    function gsManifestoRevealMeasureImages(instance) {
        instance.items.forEach(item => {

            if (item.type === 'image') {

                const originalWidth = item.node.style.width;
                const originalMargin = item.node.style.margin;

                item.node.style.width = 'auto';
                item.node.style.margin = '0 0.25em';

                const rect = item.node.getBoundingClientRect();

                item.node.style.setProperty('--target-width', `${rect.width}px`);

                item.node.style.width = originalWidth;
                item.node.style.margin = originalMargin;
            }

        });
    }

    function gsManifestoRevealSetupStagger(instance) {
        let currentTop = -1;
        let indexInLine = 0;

        instance.nodes.forEach(node => {

            const rect = node.getBoundingClientRect();

            if (Math.abs(rect.top - currentTop) > 20) {
                currentTop = rect.top;
                indexInLine = 0;
            }

            node.style.transitionDelay = `${indexInLine * 0.15}s`;
            indexInLine++;
        });
    }

    function gsManifestoRevealUpdate() {

        const triggerBottom = window.innerHeight * 0.8;

        gsManifestoRevealInstances.forEach(instance => {

            instance.items.forEach(item => {

                const rect = item.node.getBoundingClientRect();

                if (rect.top < triggerBottom) {
                    item.node.classList.add('revealed');
                } else {
                    item.node.classList.remove('revealed');
                }

            });

        });
    }

    window.addEventListener('load', gsManifestoRevealInit);

    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {

        gsManifestoRevealInstances.forEach(instance => {
            gsManifestoRevealMeasureImages(instance);
            gsManifestoRevealSetupStagger(instance);
        });

        requestAnimationFrame(gsManifestoRevealUpdate);
    });

    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {

        if (!gsManifestoRevealTicking) {

            window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                gsManifestoRevealUpdate();
                gsManifestoRevealTicking = false;
            });

            gsManifestoRevealTicking = true;
        }

    }, { passive: true });

})();
(function () {

    const gsHmPreviewCursorItems = document.querySelectorAll('.hm-item');
    const gsHmPreviewCursorElement = document.getElementById('preview-cursor');
    const gsHmPreviewCursorContainer = document.querySelector('.hm-container');

    let gsHmPreviewCursorMouseX = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorMouseY = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorX = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorY = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering = false;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorActiveImageSrc = null;

    // ---------------------------
    // Mouse Move Tracking
    // ---------------------------
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) {
        gsHmPreviewCursorMouseX = e.clientX;
        gsHmPreviewCursorMouseY = e.clientY;
    });

    // ---------------------------
    // Item Hover Events
    // ---------------------------
    gsHmPreviewCursorItems.forEach(function (item) {

        item.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () {

            gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering = true;

            const imageUrl = item.getAttribute('data-image');

            if (imageUrl) {
                gsHmPreviewCursorUpdateImage(imageUrl);
            }

            if (gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
                gsHmPreviewCursorElement.style.opacity = '1';
            }
        });

        item.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () {

            gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering = false;

            if (gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
                gsHmPreviewCursorElement.style.opacity = '0';
            }
        });

    });

    // ---------------------------
    // Animation Loop
    // ---------------------------
    function gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate() {

        if (!gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
            requestAnimationFrame(gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate);
            return;
        }

        const SHIFT_X = 400;
        const IMAGE_WIDTH = 300;
        const IMAGE_HEIGHT = 200;
        const PADDING = 24;
        const OVERFLOW_ALLOWANCE = 100;

        let targetX = gsHmPreviewCursorMouseX + SHIFT_X;
        let targetY = gsHmPreviewCursorMouseY - (IMAGE_HEIGHT / 2);

        // Boundary Logic
        if (gsHmPreviewCursorContainer) {

            const containerRect = gsHmPreviewCursorContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
            const maxLeft = containerRect.right - IMAGE_WIDTH - PADDING + OVERFLOW_ALLOWANCE;

            if (targetX > maxLeft) {
                targetX = maxLeft;
            }

        } else {

            const windowWidth = window.innerWidth;
            const maxLeft = windowWidth - IMAGE_WIDTH - PADDING;

            if (targetX > maxLeft) {
                targetX = maxLeft;
            }
        }

        // Smooth follow (lerp)
        gsHmPreviewCursorX += (targetX - gsHmPreviewCursorX) * 0.1;
        gsHmPreviewCursorY += (targetY - gsHmPreviewCursorY) * 0.1;

        const scale = gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering ? 1 : 0.9;

        gsHmPreviewCursorElement.style.transform =
            `translate(${gsHmPreviewCursorX.toFixed(2)}px, ${gsHmPreviewCursorY.toFixed(2)}px) scale(${scale})`;

        requestAnimationFrame(gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate);
    }

    // Start loop
    gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate();

    // ---------------------------
    // Image Switching Logic
    // ---------------------------
    function gsHmPreviewCursorUpdateImage(url) {

        if (!gsHmPreviewCursorElement) return;

        if (gsHmPreviewCursorActiveImageSrc === url) return;

        gsHmPreviewCursorActiveImageSrc = url;

        const img = document.createElement('img');
        img.src = url;
        img.className = 'hm-img-enter';

        const oldImages = Array.from(gsHmPreviewCursorElement.children);

        oldImages.forEach(function (child) {

            child.classList.remove('hm-img-enter');
            child.classList.add('hm-img-exit');

            setTimeout(function () {
                if (child.parentNode === gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
                    gsHmPreviewCursorElement.removeChild(child);
                }
            }, 650);

        });

        gsHmPreviewCursorElement.appendChild(img);
    }

})();
(function () {

    const gsHmPreviewCursorItems = document.querySelectorAll('.hm-item');
    const gsHmPreviewCursorElement = document.getElementById('preview-cursor');
    const gsHmPreviewCursorContainer = document.querySelector('.hm-container');

    let gsHmPreviewCursorMouseX = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorMouseY = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorX = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorY = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering = false;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorActiveImageSrc = null;

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) {
        gsHmPreviewCursorMouseX = e.clientX;
        gsHmPreviewCursorMouseY = e.clientY;
    });

    gsHmPreviewCursorItems.forEach(function (item) {

        item.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () {

            gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering = true;

            const imageUrl = item.getAttribute('data-image');

            if (imageUrl) {
                gsHmPreviewCursorUpdateImage(imageUrl);
            }

            if (gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
                gsHmPreviewCursorElement.style.opacity = '1';
            }
        });

        item.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () {

            gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering = false;

            if (gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
                gsHmPreviewCursorElement.style.opacity = '0';
            }
        });

    });

    function gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate() {

        if (!gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
            requestAnimationFrame(gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate);
            return;
        }

        const SHIFT_X = 400;
        const IMAGE_WIDTH = 300;
        const IMAGE_HEIGHT = 200;
        const PADDING = 24;
        const OVERFLOW_ALLOWANCE = 100;

        let targetX = gsHmPreviewCursorMouseX + SHIFT_X;
        let targetY = gsHmPreviewCursorMouseY - (IMAGE_HEIGHT / 2);

        if (gsHmPreviewCursorContainer) {

            const containerRect = gsHmPreviewCursorContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
            const maxLeft = containerRect.right - IMAGE_WIDTH - PADDING + OVERFLOW_ALLOWANCE;

            if (targetX > maxLeft) {
                targetX = maxLeft;
            }

        } else {

            const windowWidth = window.innerWidth;
            const maxLeft = windowWidth - IMAGE_WIDTH - PADDING;

            if (targetX > maxLeft) {
                targetX = maxLeft;
            }
        }

        gsHmPreviewCursorX += (targetX - gsHmPreviewCursorX) * 0.1;
        gsHmPreviewCursorY += (targetY - gsHmPreviewCursorY) * 0.1;

        const scale = gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering ? 1 : 0.9;

        gsHmPreviewCursorElement.style.transform =
            `translate(${gsHmPreviewCursorX.toFixed(2)}px, ${gsHmPreviewCursorY.toFixed(2)}px) scale(${scale})`;

        requestAnimationFrame(gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate());
    }

    gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate();

    function gsHmPreviewCursorUpdateImage(url) {

        if (!gsHmPreviewCursorElement) return;

        if (gsHmPreviewCursorActiveImageSrc === url) return;

        gsHmPreviewCursorActiveImageSrc = url;

        const img = document.createElement('img');
        img.src = url;
        img.className = 'hm-img-enter';

        const oldImages = Array.from(gsHmPreviewCursorElement.children);

        oldImages.forEach(function (child) {

            child.classList.remove('hm-img-enter');
            child.classList.add('hm-img-exit');

            setTimeout(function () {
                if (child.parentNode === gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
                    gsHmPreviewCursorElement.removeChild(child);
                }
            }, 650);

        });

        gsHmPreviewCursorElement.appendChild(img);
    }

})();
(function () {

    const gsHmPreviewCursorItems = document.querySelectorAll('.hm-item');
    const gsHmPreviewCursorElement = document.getElementById('preview-cursor');
    const gsHmPreviewCursorContainer = document.querySelector('.hm-container');

    let gsHmPreviewCursorMouseX = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorMouseY = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorX = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorY = 0;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering = false;
    let gsHmPreviewCursorActiveImageSrc = null;

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) {
        gsHmPreviewCursorMouseX = e.clientX;
        gsHmPreviewCursorMouseY = e.clientY;
    });

    gsHmPreviewCursorItems.forEach(function (item) {

        item.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () {

            gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering = true;

            const imageUrl = item.getAttribute('data-image');

            if (imageUrl) {
                gsHmPreviewCursorUpdateImage(imageUrl);
            }

            if (gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
                gsHmPreviewCursorElement.style.opacity = '1';
            }
        });

        item.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () {

            gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering = false;

            if (gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
                gsHmPreviewCursorElement.style.opacity = '0';
            }
        });

    });

    function gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate() {

        if (!gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
            requestAnimationFrame(gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate);
            return;
        }

        const SHIFT_X = 400;
        const IMAGE_WIDTH = 300;
        const IMAGE_HEIGHT = 200;
        const PADDING = 24;
        const OVERFLOW_ALLOWANCE = 100;

        let targetX = gsHmPreviewCursorMouseX + SHIFT_X;
        let targetY = gsHmPreviewCursorMouseY - (IMAGE_HEIGHT / 2);

        if (gsHmPreviewCursorContainer) {

            const containerRect = gsHmPreviewCursorContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
            const maxLeft = containerRect.right - IMAGE_WIDTH - PADDING + OVERFLOW_ALLOWANCE;

            if (targetX > maxLeft) {
                targetX = maxLeft;
            }

        } else {

            const windowWidth = window.innerWidth;
            const maxLeft = windowWidth - IMAGE_WIDTH - PADDING;

            if (targetX > maxLeft) {
                targetX = maxLeft;
            }
        }

        gsHmPreviewCursorX += (targetX - gsHmPreviewCursorX) * 0.1;
        gsHmPreviewCursorY += (targetY - gsHmPreviewCursorY) * 0.1;

        const scale = gsHmPreviewCursorIsHovering ? 1 : 0.9;

        gsHmPreviewCursorElement.style.transform =
            `translate(${gsHmPreviewCursorX.toFixed(2)}px, ${gsHmPreviewCursorY.toFixed(2)}px) scale(${scale})`;

        requestAnimationFrame(gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate());
    }

    gsHmPreviewCursorAnimate();

    function gsHmPreviewCursorUpdateImage(url) {

        if (!gsHmPreviewCursorElement) return;

        if (gsHmPreviewCursorActiveImageSrc === url) return;

        gsHmPreviewCursorActiveImageSrc = url;

        const img = document.createElement('img');
        img.src = url;
        img.className = 'hm-img-enter';

        const oldImages = Array.from(gsHmPreviewCursorElement.children);

        oldImages.forEach(function (child) {

            child.classList.remove('hm-img-enter');
            child.classList.add('hm-img-exit');

            setTimeout(function () {
                if (child.parentNode === gsHmPreviewCursorElement) {
                    gsHmPreviewCursorElement.removeChild(child);
                }
            }, 650);

        });

        gsHmPreviewCursorElement.appendChild(img);
    }

})();

</script>

-g1443587582.webp"},{"src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase11\/zodiac_wheel_copper_bold_4096.svg"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/pisces-icon.png"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/aquarius-icon.png"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/capricorn-icon.png"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/scorpio-icon.png"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/sagitarius-icon.png"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/libra-icon.png"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/virgo-icon.png"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/leo-icon.png"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/cancer-icon.png"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/gemini-icon.png"},{"lib_id":"","lib":"","src":"https:\/\/ottmann-polignac.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/revslider\/Horoscope-Slider-with-Zodiac-Showcase\/taurus-icon.png"}],"hasYT":false,"version":"6.7.41"},"slides":{"387":{"id":387,"slide":{"addOns":[],"id":387,"version":"6.7.41","actions":[{"a":"playScene","evt":"mouseenter","sc":"in","rec":tru
